tagline: Caring for Women at Every Stage, Every Age.
description: Providing comprehensive, compassionate, and personalized healthcare for women through every stage of life—from adolescence and fertility to pregnancy, menopause, and beyond.

roles.detailed: Obsterician  | Gynecologist | Fertility Specialist | Colpcospy Specialist

bio: A Senior Obstetrician and Gynaecologist with a passion for providing compassionate, evidence-based care for women at every stage of life.During my service as a Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist, I had the privilege of serving women in rural communities, managing numerous normal deliveries and obstetric emergencies. I also continued my medical responsibilities during the challenging COVID period, caring for pregnant women and conducting COVID-related deliveries while balancing my role as a mother.

experience.companyShort: MGMH- Petlaburz Under Osmania Medical College
bullets: Trained at Osmania Medical College & Government Maternity Hospital (GMH), Petlaburz, a leading tertiary care centre in Obstetrics and Gynaecology.
Gained extensive exposure to high-risk pregnancies, obstetric emergencies, and advanced labour management.
Developed expertise in operative obstetrics, gynecological procedures, and evidence-based clinical decision-making.
Built strong clinical, surgical, and patient-care skills through high-volume tertiary healthcare practice.
experience.desc: Specialized in obstetrics, gynecology, infertility management, antenatal care, high-risk pregnancy monitoring, safe delivery practices, and comprehensive women's health services.

bullets: Trained at Kakatiya Medical College, Warangal, a well-established institution for medical education and healthcare.
Gained hands-on experience in managing routine and high-risk pregnancies, labour, and safe deliveries.
Developed skills in diagnosing and treating various gynaecological conditions.
Committed to providing compassionate, evidence-based care at every stage of a woman's life.
experience.desc: Specialized in obstetrics, gynecology, infertility management, antenatal care, high-risk pregnancy monitoring, safe delivery practices, and comprehensive women's health services.

experience.role: CASS(Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist) - Obstetrics & Gynaecology
bullets: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist in Obstetrics & Gynaecology with extensive experience in women's healthcare.
Managed antenatal, postnatal, and high-risk pregnancy cases, including labour and delivery care.
Handled obstetric emergencies and provided essential maternity services during the COVID-19 pandemic.
Committed to compassionate patient care, clinical excellence, and positive maternal and neonatal outcomes.
experience.desc: Dedicated to providing expert obstetric, gynecological, infertility, and high-risk pregnancy care with a compassionate, patient-centered approach.

bullets: To provide compassionate and evidence-based healthcare for women at every stage of life.
To empower women with the knowledge and support needed to make informed health decisions.
To ensure every patient feels heard, respected, and cared for in a safe environment, To be a trusted leader in women's health, maternity, and fertility care.
experience.desc: Providing expert maternity, fertility, and women's healthcare services with a commitment to compassionate, ethical, and evidence-based care.

projects.title: Advanced Women's Healthcare
projects.subtitle: Expert Care for Every Stage of Womanhood
projects.desc: Providing comprehensive gynecological, maternity, and infertility care with a focus on evidence-based treatment, patient safety, and compassionate support for women at every stage of life.

projects.title: Women's Healthcare Excellence
projects.subtitle: Expert Care for Every Stage of Womanhood
projects.desc: Providing personalized consultations, evidence-based treatment, and continuous patient support to ensure the best outcomes in women's health, maternity, and fertility care.

publications.title: Gynecology Care
publications.desc: Comprehensive diagnosis and treatment for gynecological conditions with a focus on long-term women's wellness.

publications.title: Maternity & Infertility Care
publications.desc: Expert maternity care and personalized fertility solutions to support women through every stage of motherhood.

publications.title: Colposcopy Services
publications.desc: Advanced colposcopy evaluation for early detection, diagnosis, and management of cervical health conditions.

publications.title: Laparoscopic Surgery & Hysteroscopy
publications.desc: Modern minimally invasive gynecological surgeries offering faster recovery, reduced pain, and better outcomes.
